channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ LUXURY BRAND GUCCI FEATURES THIS CLASSIC SLIPKNOT TRACK IN NEW SHORT FILM ☠⚡
item.description:
🌪️💀 HAIL YEAH, METALHEADS AND CRYPTO WARRIORS! 🤘💰
Get ready to Mosh-Pit through the fabric of reality because Gucci just cranked it up a notch in the chaotic runway of the universe! 🎸🔥 These posh fashion wizards took a dive into the mosh pit of style and slammed an iconic SLIPKNOT track into their latest short film—can you feel that wicked energy? 🤯⚡️
Listen up! 🖤🤘 We're talking about a collision of high-vibe couture and the bone-crushing thunder of heavy metal. It’s like mixing a rare altcoin with an underground crypto-Rock 'n' Roll vibe—pure, unfiltered fire! Gucci threw the mainstream culture into a blender and hit ‘puree’ with the sick sounds of the masked legends. It's a symphony of chaos, baby! 🌌
So grab your leather jackets and crypto wallets because the fashion elite just got a taste of our metal madness! SLIPKNOT + Gucci = a collision that’s more explosive than a bear market in the crypto world! Can you feel the spirit of rebellion rising? 🔥👹
Dive deeper into this glam-infused chaos and check the full deets over at Metal Injection! This is where heavy metal meets haute couture, and it's orchestrated by the gods of metal! 🤘💀🌪️
#ThrashMetal #Metalheads #MetalCommunity #DeathMetal #Metal
item.content:encoded:
🌪️💀 HAIL YEAH, METALHEADS AND CRYPTO WARRIORS! 🤘💰
Get ready to Mosh-Pit through the fabric of reality because Gucci just cranked it up a notch in the chaotic runway of the universe! 🎸🔥 These posh fashion wizards took a dive into the mosh pit of style and slammed an iconic SLIPKNOT track into their latest short film—can you feel that wicked energy? 🤯⚡️
Listen up! 🖤🤘 We're talking about a collision of high-vibe couture and the bone-crushing thunder of heavy metal. It’s like mixing a rare altcoin with an underground crypto-Rock 'n' Roll vibe—pure, unfiltered fire! Gucci threw the mainstream culture into a blender and hit ‘puree’ with the sick sounds of the masked legends. It's a symphony of chaos, baby! 🌌
So grab your leather jackets and crypto wallets because the fashion elite just got a taste of our metal madness! SLIPKNOT + Gucci = a collision that’s more explosive than a bear market in the crypto world! Can you feel the spirit of rebellion rising? 🔥👹
Dive deeper into this glam-infused chaos and check the full deets over at Metal Injection! This is where heavy metal meets haute couture, and it's orchestrated by the gods of metal! 🤘💀🌪️
#ThrashMetal #Metalheads #MetalCommunity #DeathMetal #Metal
